content.question: To what degree does capacity constraint in the expert committee system (documented waiting times of several months) suppress observed identification rates, such that actual unmet need is higher than identified caseloads suggest?
content.reduction_path: Model the relationship between assessment queue length, processing time, and identification rates; conduct needs assessment of unidentified children in areas with long waiting lists; and measure whether expansion of expert committee capacity increases identification rates independently of diagnostic threshold changes.
